name: Iter12 — Unified Navbar + Comparisons page
description: Verify the unified Navbar appears on all pages with correct active highlighting, all nav links work, and the /comparisons page renders correctly.

planSteps.description: The navbar is visible with links: Review, History, Batch, Compare, Comparisons
Click the 'History' link in the navbar
The URL changes to /dashboard and the 'History' link appears active
Click the 'Batch' link in the navbar
The URL changes to /batch and the page heading 'Batch Review' is visible
Click the 'Compare' link in the navbar
The URL changes to /compare and the page heading 'Compare Two PRs' is visible
Click the 'Comparisons' link in the navbar
The heading 'Saved Comparisons' is visible on the page
Either a comparisons table or the empty state message 'No comparisons saved yet' is visible
A '+ New Comparison' button is visible on the page
The navbar is still visible with all links intact
